commitMessage:
Validate `container system logs --last` flag (#1561)

- Closes #1530.

## Type of Change
- [x] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature  
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Motivation and Context
Reject invalid `--last` values in system logs, matching the format
accepted by `log show`.
